info.name: MUZN ERP API
info.description:
MUZN Delivery Operations ERP — Complete API Collection

**Base URL:** https://api.muzndelivery.com/api

**Setup:**
1. Login request chalao
2. Response se `token` copy karo
3. Collection Variables mein `token` set karo

**Default Credentials:**
- owner@muzn.com / password
- superadmin@muzn.com / password
- admin@muzn.com / password

**Roles:** owner | superadmin | admin

request.description: Login — returns Bearer token. Token ko copy karke Collection Variable `token` mein set karo.

item.name: ⚙️ Settings
item.description: App Settings — Zones, Departments, Platforms etc.

request.description:
Type examples: zone, work_emirate, platform_name, job_title, department, fine_type

Dashboard aliases (also accepted):
  emirate  → same rows as work_emirate
  platform → same rows as platform_name

Use GET /settings/types to see all valid types.
Setting IDs ki nayi order array bhejo. Type examples: zone, department, platform

item.name: 👥 Employees
item.description: Employee Management — CRUD, Documents, Expiry Alerts

request.description:
Upload Excel (.xlsx/.xls) or CSV to create employees in bulk.

Required columns: name, mobile
Optional: email, nationality, work_emirate, zone, platform_name, salary_amount, salary_type, emirates_id, passport_number, passport_expiry, emirates_id_expiry, visa_expiry, labour_card_expiry, driving_license_expiry

Date format: YYYY-MM-DD

Row errors:
- 'Missing name'
- 'Missing mobile number'
- 'Wrong date format in {field} (use YYYY-MM-DD)'
- 'Duplicate Emirates ID {eid} in file'
- 'Emirates ID {eid} already exists in system'

Response 200: all rows valid
Response 207: partial success — check error_report_token to download CSV of errors.

Upload Excel/CSV to update existing employees by employee_id.

Required column: employee_id (e.g. EMP-0001)
Updatable: mobile, email, work_emirate, zone, platform_name, salary_amount, status, passport_expiry, emirates_id_expiry, visa_expiry, labour_card_expiry, driving_license_expiry

Date format: YYYY-MM-DD
Only provided columns are updated (empty cells are skipped).

Download CSV error report from a previous bulk import or update.
Replace {{error_token}} with the error_report_token from bulk import/update response.

item.name: 📊 Dashboard
item.description: Dashboard — Month filter + multi-filter support. Owner sees all sections, Admin sees operational only.

request.description:
Owner: full financial + operational.
Admin: operational only.
No filters = current month.

query.description: integer employee id — scope dashboard to a single rider

request.description:
All filters optional. Combine: ?month=2026-04&emirate=dubai&platform=noon

**employee_id** — scope the entire dashboard to a single rider/employee (their employee stats, their assigned bike, their payroll/fines).

Note: emirate and platform values come from GET /settings/emirate and GET /settings/platform (slugified, e.g. 'dubai', 'noon').
Expiry alerts for employee documents + bike documents + financial alerts (owner only).

query.description: integer — scope to a single rider

request.description:
Row counts per module for selected month. Shows whether data exists.
Returns: income_rows, expense_rows, payroll_rows, fine_rows, salik_rows.
